ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Cosmic Abyssal Nebula
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Semi-translucent deep midnight blue and violet swirls.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Green Gold
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Semi-translucent green with gold flecks.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: The Enchanted Grove
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Crystal-clear resin on the top half, seamlessly fading into a smoky, moss-green opaque base.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Eldritch Horizon
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Murky, translucent teal with dark tendrils of opaque black alcohol ink cutting sharply through the center.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Gilded Archive
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Swirled warm amber, rich honey, and cream-colored resin designed to mimic the look of aged, weathered parchment.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Synthwave Overdrive
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A sharp, clean diagonal split—one half vibrant translucent magenta, the other half electric cyan.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: The Reliquary
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Translucent or semi-translucent dark purple resin, filled with swirling crimson and black smoke effects.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Crimson Nebula Liquid Core
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A translucent deep red and swirling purple resin D20 houses a swirling liquid core filled with iridescent glitter dust.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Caustic Slime Aberration
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A translucent, split half-and-half resin d20 swirling with toxic green and sickly purple, featuring embedded gold foil flakes that catch the light like shimmering bile.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Orange Cream Swirl D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A sharp-edged D20 crafted from translucent orange glass suspended with opaque white cream swirls and distinct melting globules.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Wraith Smoke D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A translucent smoky black and deep teal resin core swirling with wisps of silver foil flakes to mimic the ethereal, tattered cloak of a haunting wraith.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Neon Grave D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A smoke-filled, translucent icosahedron featuring vibrant neon pink skulls and crossed golden swords emblazoned on its triangular faces.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Nephviri's Hair D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A sharp-edged, translucent light violet glass 20-sided die containing a horned tiefling skull with long hair interwoven with miniature daggers, vibrant flowers, and tiny woodland animals.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Highmate Neko
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A translucent cerulean glass D20 woven with elegant white swirls and shimmering gold foil, holding partially obscured pixel-art cat inclusions suspended within its depths.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: The Samhaphage
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A dark, blood-red and obsidian die adorned with sinister thorns and an eerie, smooth black sphere reminiscent of a monstrous entity.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Manic Eye D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A transparent glass D20 filled with neon-green liquid that suspends a single, manic red eye.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Translucent Sapphire D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A gleaming, twenty-sided die forged from translucent blue sapphire with a prominent black border and sharp, crystalline facets.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Gouged Ancient Wood
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A minimalist icosahedron crafted from heavily scratched and gouged wood.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Scrap Steel Wreckage D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A minimalist d20 forged from dull, scratched steel repurposed from mechanical wreckage.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Lustrous Plasteel Spacer D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A minimalist d20 silhouette featuring a smooth, ceramic-like plasteel surface that emits a subtle, icy blue sheen along its sharp geometric facets.
